source_plan_pack.title: CP00-890 RP29.P07.M04.S16-RP29.P08.M01.S05 generated_from_weighted_implementation_ledger
source_plan_pack.renumbering_policy: Pack IDs are monotonic after the latest live closeout pack. If a requested locked queue skips live-open ledger units, live-open units are inserted first and requested packs are shifted with correction_reason.
